user_decision.decision_verbatim: 同意能力 5，但我不需要模擬下單，我要算的是分析和股票價值。
effect: Capability 5 reshaped from paper trading simulation to valuation & analysis.
Paper trading / simulated order matching returned to deferred_not_approved.
Broker read-only connector remains a separate, unapproved human gate.

superseded.retention: retained for audit history only; authorizes nothing

alignment_checks.requirement: worksheet shows EPS source, PE source, safety margin, formula version, data status; manual input labelled draft, never consensus or official forward estimate
alignment_checks.note: Contract schema tqe-fair-value-worksheet/v1 carries safety_margin, formula_version tqe-fair-value/v1, data status draft, and fixed user_supplied_assumption source labels for EPS/PE.

alignment_checks.requirement: enabling_preconditions partially satisfied only via contract definition; no status flip
alignment_checks.note: activation_note added to that contract entry pointing to the P6 contract; render_behavior stays draft.

alignment_checks.requirement: period, price basis, and population/sample convention recorded before computation
alignment_checks.note: Contract records all three conventions for this slice: explicit integer period, raw close basis, population standard deviation.

alignment_checks.requirement: admitted price-policy contract exists before zscore becomes a computed field
alignment_checks.note: Admitted price basis is EOD OHLCV close under the P4/P5 boundary with the P5 adjusted-OHLCV policy; zscore included in this slice with recorded conventions.

alignment_checks.requirement: official fundamentals and forward EPS/PE remain unavailable in this phase
alignment_checks.note: Contract excludes automatic fundamental population (blocked on C1 source admission) and any estimate/consensus source; cannot-claim list records both.

acceptance_notes: Capability 5 is reshaped per the owner's 2026-07-22 decision: valuation & analysis replaces paper trading simulation in the approved order 3 -> 5 -> 2.
Scope layering reflects the data reality: only admitted EOD OHLCV is computable today; official fundamentals stay defined_pending_source_admission (C1) and are excluded.
All valuation inputs are user-supplied assumptions labelled draft; the engine computes fair value and buy-zone deterministically and never fetches or estimates fundamentals.
No simulated order matching, no order artifact, no investment advice, solicitation, or performance promise is authorized.
This evidence records a contract and a work-unit draft only; no valuation or analysis functionality is implemented. Implementation requires human approval of the work-unit digest.
Capabilities 1, 4, and 6 remain deferred_not_approved; paper trading joins them as deferred_not_approved; capability 2 remains approved_next pending capability 5 completion.
The approved P4 boundary is unchanged and p4_research_closure.py passes.
